lsp.justification: Fully correct: it identifies the actual construction site as `checkType()` calling `addReplyErrorObject(c, shared.wrongtypeerr)` in `src/object.c:887`, and traces both SET-specific option-gated paths through `setGenericCommand` (`GET` via `getGenericCommand` and `IFEQ/IFNE/IFDEQ/IFDNE` direct check). It also correctly notes that plain `SET` overwrites without WRONGTYPE, avoiding the scope trap of attributing other commands' checks to SET.
